heading: Worrowing Heights vs Woy Woy Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Worrowing Heights, New South Wales and Woy Woy Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Worrowing Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Woy Woy Bay (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Worrowing Heights or Woy Woy Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Worrowing Heights has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Woy Woy Bay scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Worrowing Heights scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Woy Woy Bay scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Worrowing Heights or Woy Woy Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Worrowing Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
